hero.title: Vietnamese & Thai cuisine in Laeken.
hero.subtitle: A warm neighbourhood table — where tradition meets the simple pleasure of a well-crafted dish.

about.title: Our Table
about.body: Located in the heart of the Laeken neighbourhood in Brussels, Lotus welcomes you in a warm and friendly setting. A beloved local canteen for Vietnamese and Thai cuisine, our dishes are meant to be shared among friends, family, and colleagues. Our mission is simple: serve delicious, affordable food you'll want to order week after week.

nem.name: Vietnamese Nem (4 pcs)
nem.desc: Pork, shrimp, black mushrooms, nuoc-mam sauce

tom_yum.name: Tom Yum Soup
tom_yum.desc: Spicy shrimp broth with lemongrass and galangal

pho_bo.name: Pho Bo
pho_bo.desc: Homemade beef broth, rice noodles, fresh herbs

pad_thai.name: Pad Thai
pad_thai.desc: Stir-fried noodles with shrimp, peanuts, lime

bo_bun.name: Bo Bun
bo_bun.desc: Rice vermicelli, grilled beef, spring rolls, raw vegetables

green_curry.name: Thai Green Curry
green_curry.desc: Chicken, coconut milk, aubergine, Thai basil

canard_laque.name: Lacquered Duck
canard_laque.desc: Roasted duck, hoisin sauce, mandarin pancakes

riz_saute.name: Vegetable Fried Rice
riz_saute.desc: Fragrant rice, seasonal vegetables, soy sauce

creme_coco.name: Coconut Cream
creme_coco.desc: Tapioca pearls, coconut milk, fresh mango

the_jasmin.name: Jasmine Tea
the_jasmin.desc: Green tea infused with jasmine blossoms

events.title: Events
events.body: Book Lotus for your next private event, birthday, or corporate dinner. We also offer a home catering service for all your special occasions.
